title: elymus alaskanus subsp. scandicus
intro: Elymus alaskanus subsp. scandicus, also known as Scandinavian wild rye, is a perennial grass native to Northern Europe, particularly in the Scandinavian countries. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Elymus alaskanus subsp. scandicus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
